{{Quote|To the focused mind, impossible nothing is...|[[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]]|<ref name="Run Mace Run">{{CWACite|2|Run Mace Run}}</ref>}}
This '''mission to Omphalos''' was a mission undertaken five months after the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==The mission==
The mission was a covert operation under the command of [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]].

Arriving on a [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i gunship]], the objective was to stop a weapon being developed for [[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]]. The weapon was known as 'the [[Planet Killer]]'. However, the LAAT/i was shot down, and Windu's force of clones were all dead. After burying them, he continued the mission.

Through lessons likely learned as a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], Windu strove to complete his mission. Reaching a bridge, the Jedi Master encountered his first sign of [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|droids]]. He fought his way through a large group of droids, defeating them all.

Upon reaching the 'Planet Killer', Windu fought and defeated two [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]] and then disabled the weapon by destroying its detonator.

==Aftermath==
As a result of the Planet Killer's failure, Count Dooku sped up plans for his own [[Death Star/Legends|superweapon]].
